samples.gvd:
module fsm
(
    input IN,
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg MATCH
);

reg [2:0] state, next_state;
parameter S0 = 3'b000, S1 = 3'b001, S2 = 3'b010, S3 = 3'b011, S4 = 3'b100, S5 = 3'b101, S6 = 3'b110, S7 = 3'b111;

always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        state <= S0;
        MATCH <= 1'b0;
    end
    else begin
        state <= next_state;
        case (state)
            S0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S2;
                end
            end
            S2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S3;
                end
            end
            S3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S4;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                    MATCH <= 1'b1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                next_state <= S0;
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects the sequence '10011' in the input signal IN. Outputs MATCH=1 when the sequence is detected, and MATCH=0 otherwise.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Single-bit input signal.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state>STATE_IDLE</state>
        <state>STATE_1</state>
        <state>STATE_0</state>
        <state>STATE_00</state>
        <state>STATE_11</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="current_state" width="3">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <wire id="next_state" width="3">Next state of the FSM.</wire>
        <assign current_state = {current_state[2], current_state[1], current_state[0]} />
        <always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                current_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                MATCH <= 0;
            end else begin
                case (current_state)
                    STATE_IDLE: begin
                        if (IN == 1'b1) begin
                            next_state <= STATE_1;
                        end else begin
                            next_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                        end
                    end
                    STATE_1: begin
                        if (IN == 1'b0) begin
                            next_state <= STATE_0;
                        end else begin
                            next_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                        end
                    end
                    STATE_0: begin
                        if (IN == 1'b0) begin
                            next_state <= STATE_00;
                        end else begin
                            next_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                        end
                    end
                    STATE_00: begin
                        if (IN == 1'b1) begin
                            next_state <= STATE_11;
                        end else begin
                            next_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                        end
                    end
                    STATE_11: begin
                        if (IN == 1'b1) begin
                            next_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                            MATCH <= 1;
                        end else begin
                            next_state <= STATE_IDLE;
                            MATCH <= 0;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Sequential logic implementing the Mealy FSM for detecting the sequence '10011'.</implementation>
</module>
```
